mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, email, password_hash) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash})
INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id) SELECT #{userId}, r.id FROM role r WHERE r.code = #{roleCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.email, u.created_at AS user_created_at, COUNT(a.id) AS api_key_count FROM user_account u LEFT JOIN api_key a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.email, u.created_at

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.email, u.created_at AS user_created_at, COUNT(a.id) AS api_key_count FROM user_account u LEFT JOIN api_key a ON u.id = a.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.email, u.created_at
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account
SELECT code FROM role r LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{id}
